thing-type.label: Gemini Account
thing-type.description: Integrates the Google Gemini API with openHAB.

parameter-group.name: hli
parameter-group.label: Model Configuration
parameter-group.description: Configures the used model and its behavior. Applies to the Human Language Interpreter and as a default for all channels and Thing actions.

parameter.name: apiKey
parameter.label: API Key
parameter.description: The Google Gemini API key (Create & Manage API keys in Google AI Studio).

parameter.name: model
parameter.label: Model
parameter.description: The Google Gemini model to use (Models, Pricing).

parameter.name: temperature
parameter.label: Temperature
parameter.description: Controls randomness. Higher values mean more random responses.

parameter.name: topP
parameter.label: Top-P
parameter.description: Controls the cumulative probability threshold for token selection.

parameter.name: maxOutputTokens
parameter.label: Max Output Tokens
parameter.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the response.

parameter.name: requestTimeout
parameter.label: Request Timeout
parameter.description: The timeout in seconds for API requests.

channel-type.label: Chat
channel-type.description: Send a prompt to a model and receive a response.

parameter.name: temperature
parameter.label: Temperature
parameter.description: Controls randomness. Higher values mean more random responses.

parameter.name: topP
parameter.label: Top-P
parameter.description: Controls the cumulative probability threshold for token selection.

parameter.name: maxOutputTokens
parameter.label: Max Output Tokens
parameter.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the response.

parameter.name: systemMessage
parameter.label: System Message
parameter.description: The system instruction provided to the model.
